name: Dwi Arya Ramadhani
title: Presales Engineer & Full-Stack Developer
tagline: Engineering secure enterprise solutions that bridge business and technology.
bio: As a Presales Engineer and Full-Stack Developer, I combine solution consulting with hands-on engineering to deliver enterprise-grade applications and secure digital platforms. My experience includes web development, API integration, payment gateways, IoT systems, cloud deployment, and database security. I'm also experienced with the Thales CipherTrust Data Security Platform (CDSP), including CipherTrust Manager, CipherTrust Tokenization Server (CTS/CTVL), CipherTrust Transparent Encryption (CTE), and KMIP, helping organizations implement encryption, tokenization, key management, and data security best practices.
